title: Blast Off to Movie Magic!
story: Lights, camera, rocket! In 1902, a groundbreaking film took viewers on an out-of-this-world adventure. 'A Trip To The Moon' dazzled audiences with its fantastical story of space explorers landing on the lunar surface. Released on September 2, this silent masterpiece by Georges Méliès pioneered special effects that would inspire filmmakers for generations. Its iconic image of a rocket stuck in the Moon's eye became a symbol of early cinema's limitless imagination.

activity_choices: It was the first sci-fi film
activity_answer: It was the first sci-fi film
bonus_fact: The film was only 14 minutes long, but took 3 months to make!

Thompson's journey took him from NBA champion with the Boston Celtics to legendary coach at Georgetown University. His powerful presence on the sidelines inspired players and fans alike for nearly three decades.
activity_question: What team did John Thompson Jr. win NBA championships with as a player?
follow_up_question: How many years did John Thompson Jr. coach at Georgetown University?

title: Motown's Vocal Powerhouse Born
story: A voice that would help define Motown's sound entered the world in 1943. Rosalind Ashford, born on September 2 in Detroit, Michigan, grew up to become a rock vocal sensation. She joined Martha Reeves & The Vandellas, belting out hits like 'Heat Wave' and 'Dancing In The Street' that got everyone moving to the beat.
activity_question: What famous Motown group did Rosalind Ashford join?
bonus_fact: Motown Records, founded in Detroit, helped launch the careers of many African American artists in the 1960s.

title: Electronic Music Pioneer Born in Hamburg
story: Beep, boop, whirr! The sounds of electronic music filled the air when Michael Rother was born in Hamburg, West Germany in 1950. On September 2 that year, a future musical innovator entered the world. Rother grew up to become a key figure in electronic and experimental rock, playing with influential bands like Kraftwerk, Neu!, and Harmonia.
activity_question: What type of music is Michael Rother known for?
follow_up_question: Can you name one of the bands Michael Rother played with?
